response.justification: Bogdan is a strong senior engineer with highly relevant domain experience, having founded and developed a geospatial data platform (GISCollective). His work at Dunnhumby with low-latency Dlang applications also demonstrates capability in building high-performance systems. However, his professional C++ experience is minimal and dated (2015), and he has no listed Rust experience, which is a significant gap given the job's primary technology requirements. An interview is recommended to assess his systems programming fundamentals and his ability to quickly become productive in modern C++.
strengths: Extensive experience building and maintaining a geospatial data platform (GISCollective).
Proven experience with high-performance, low-latency systems programming using Dlang.
Strong seniority and a broad technical background, showing adaptability across different stacks.
concerns: Lacks recent commercial experience in modern C++, the primary language for the role.
Geospatial experience seems more focused on GIS data collection rather than routing tile optimization.
Most recent experience is heavily focused on TypeScript/Node.js, which is not the core stack for this position.
